violations.text: The establishment does not employ a Rhode Island Certified Food Protection Manager. Establishment must register with the state. Application emailed to the PIC. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2024

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the prep area entryway and men's restroom. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2025

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). Sanitizer bottle was observed empty during time of inspection. Bottle was replaced and sanitizer read at correct concentration. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2025
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the left side icemachine and entryway handsink have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2025

The establishment does not employ a Rhode Island Certified Food Protection Manager. Establishment must register with the state. Application emailed to the PIC. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2024

The door to the outside, located in the backroom, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2024
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2024
Two iced coffee handles connected to dispenser were observed held together by black tape. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2024
